schema.description: The complete ATPL exam preparation platform with 20,000+ questions, research-based explanations, aviation dictionary, live quizzes, and study tools.
schema.offerFreeDescription: Free plan with no credit card: access to the question bank, STUDY quiz mode and aviation dictionary.
schema.offerPremiumDescription: €10/month with no commitment: complete question bank (20,000+), all quiz modes unlimited, live quizzes, full dictionary, library, AI study assistant and priority support.
schema.featureDictionary: Aviation dictionary with audio and 3D models

faq.a1: MyATPS is a complete online platform designed to help student pilots prepare for their ATPL exams. It combines an advanced quiz interface with 20,000+ questions, research-based explanations, an aviation dictionary with audio and 3D models, a resource library, live quiz sharing, and powerful progress tracking.
faq.a2: Our explanations are crafted from extensive research in aviation education and teaching methodology. Each explanation is structured to help you truly understand the concept, not just memorize the answer.
faq.a3: MyATPS offers a Free plan (no credit card, no time limit) and a Premium plan at €10/month with no commitment. You can cancel in one click from your account — access closes instantly, no follow-up calls. Most competing ATPL platforms charge between €20 and €35/month, often with multi-month commitments; we remain among the lowest prices in the ATPL market.
faq.q4: Can I study with friends or share quizzes?
faq.a4: Yes! MyATPS lets you share study sessions and launch live Kahoot-style quizzes where participants join with a simple code — no account needed.
faq.q5: Can I use MyATPS for free?
faq.a5: Yes. The Free plan gives you access to the question bank (discovery version), the STUDY quiz mode, the aviation dictionary and the community forum. No credit card required. Upgrade to Premium at €10/month whenever you're ready to unlock the full experience — or stay on Free as long as you like.

faqSection.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.contactUsSub: We'll be happy to help you.
faqSection.a1: MyATPS (Aviation Training and Preparation System) is a complete online platform designed to help student pilots prepare for their ATPL exams. It combines an advanced quiz interface with 20,000+ questions, research-based explanations, an aviation dictionary with audio and 3D models, a resource library, live quiz sharing, and powerful progress tracking — all in one place.
faqSection.a2: Our explanations are crafted from extensive research in aviation education and teaching methodology. We developed a unique explanation format based on our in-depth study of how pilots learn best — structured to help you truly understand the concept, not just memorize the answer. Each explanation is thorough, accurate, and designed to build lasting knowledge.
faqSection.a3: MyATPS offers a Free plan (no credit card, no time limit) and a Premium plan at €10/month with no commitment. You can cancel in one click from your account — access closes instantly, no follow-up calls. Most competing ATPL platforms charge between €20 and €35/month, often with multi-month commitments; we remain among the lowest prices in the ATPL market.
faqSection.a4: The aviation dictionary is a comprehensive online glossary covering all ATPL-related terminology. Each term comes with audio pronunciations, 3D interactive models of instruments and components, real images, and cross-references to related terms — from VORs to navigation instruments and beyond.
faqSection.q5: Can I study with friends or share quizzes?
faqSection.a5: Absolutely! MyATPS lets you share study sessions with specific users or make them public. You can also launch live Kahoot-style quizzes where participants join with a simple code — no account needed. It's perfect for instructors running group sessions or students organizing study groups.
faqSection.q6: Can I use MyATPS for free?
faqSection.a6: Yes. The Free plan gives you access to the question bank (discovery version), the STUDY quiz mode, the aviation dictionary and the community forum. No credit card required, no time limit. Upgrade to Premium at €10/month when you're ready to unlock the full question bank and all quiz modes — or stay on Free as long as you like.
faqSection.q7: Can I use MyATPS alongside my flight school curriculum?
faqSection.a7: Yes — it's the most common use case. MyATPS covers the 14 official EASA ATPL subjects, aligned with the syllabus your school uses. Many of our users keep it open during class to re-read an annex, or in the evening to consolidate what they covered in lecture. It's not a replacement for your school — it's the study companion your school doesn't have the time to build.
faqSection.a8: All 14 mandatory EASA subjects for the ATPL license: Air Law, Airframe & Systems, Instrumentation, Mass & Balance, Performance, Flight Planning & Monitoring, Human Performance & Limitations, Meteorology, General Navigation, Radio Navigation, Operational Procedures, Principles of Flight, Communications VFR, Communications IFR. Each subject has thousands of questions with detailed explanations and linked terms in the aviation dictionary.
faqSection.q9: How is MyATPS different from a printed question bank?
faqSection.a9: A book gives you questions and answers. MyATPS gives you explanations that actually teach the concept, instant subject search, a built-in 3D dictionary, three quiz modes (STUDY to learn, TEST to assess, EXAM to simulate real conditions), and an AI assistant when you're stuck. A book is passive; MyATPS is adaptive — and costs less than a single textbook across your full preparation.
faqSection.q10: How long do I need to subscribe to prepare for my ATPL?
faqSection.a10: Most student pilots prepare the 14 exams over 6 to 12 months at their own pace. Since Premium is €10/month with no commitment, you only pay for the months you actually use the platform — and you cancel the month you sit your final exam. In intensive flight school programs, 3 to 4 months can be enough.
faqSection.a11: No one can honestly guarantee that — your success depends on your own work. What we do guarantee: every tool is here (20,000+ EASA-aligned questions, explanations written by student pilots, progress analytics that honestly flag your weak areas). Users who pass on the first attempt average 30 questions per day and consistently read the explanations. The tools are ours, the discipline is yours.

hero.chatUser1: I'm struggling with ILS approach questions — can you help me understand the key concepts?
hero.chatAi1: Absolutely! Our research-backed explanations break it down clearly: the localizer provides lateral guidance, while the glide slope handles vertical guidance — both using radio beams to guide you to the runway threshold.
hero.chatUser2: Great, let me start a quiz on Radio Navigation!
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search questions, topics, or ask your assistant…

testimonials.heading: What they're Saying
testimonials.t1Text: "MyATPS completely transformed my ATPL preparation. The explanations are incredibly detailed and well-researched — concepts I had struggled with for months finally clicked. The quiz interface is unlike anything else out there."
testimonials.t2Text: "The live quiz feature is amazing for group study. My instructor uses it to run sessions with the whole class, and the dictionary with 3D models and audio helped me understand instruments I could only read about before."
testimonials.t3Text: "I passed all 14 ATPL written exams on the first attempt. The question bank is massive, the explanations are clear and research-backed, and the built-in tools meant I never had to switch between apps."

work.heading: A Simple 3-Step Process
work.description: From sign-up to your first quiz in under two minutes. No complex setup, no separate apps to install — just open MyATPS and start studying.
work.step1Description: Sign up in seconds with the Free plan — no credit card required. Upgrade to Premium at €10/month whenever you want, with no commitment.
work.step2Description: Train across three quiz modes, look up terms in the 3D dictionary, access the resource library, and invite classmates to live sessions.
work.step3Description: Track your progress across all 14 subjects, spot your weak areas with color-coded analytics, and sit your exam with confidence.

bento.heading: The complete ATPL preparation platform
bento.description: No other platform combines a quiz engine, aviation dictionary, live sharing, resource library, and built-in study tools in a single environment — MyATPS does.
bento.card1Description: An all-in-one study environment with built-in plugins — annotator, calculator, integrated assistant, library access, comments, and annexes — all without leaving your session
bento.card2Description: A comprehensive aviation glossary with audio pronunciations, 3D interactive models, real images, and cross-referenced terms — from VORs to flight instruments
bento.card3Description: Share your study sessions with classmates, invite collaborators, or launch live Kahoot-style quizzes with real-time leaderboards — no account required for participants
bento.card4Description: Access e-books, PDFs, aviation annexes, and procedures — a complete resource library to support your study sessions and deepen your understanding

about.paragraph: MyATPS was born out of frustration from student pilots in ATPL training. Existing platforms charged €30 to €35 per month with lock-in contracts, and explanations too often read like copy-pasted EASA syllabus. We built what we wished we'd had: a complete platform — 20,000+ explained questions, an aviation dictionary with audio & 3D models, live quizzes, a resource library and an AI assistant — at €10/month with no commitment, plus a permanent free plan for every student pilot. Built by students, for students.

keyBenefits.heading: Why Choose MyATPS
keyBenefits.description: Other platforms give you questions. MyATPS gives you an entire study ecosystem — from research-backed explanations and 3D models to live group quizzes and built-in flight tools.
keyBenefits.left1Description: Every question comes with a research-based explanation — not generic AI answers, but expert-crafted content designed to build real understanding
keyBenefits.left2Description: The only ATPL dictionary with audio pronunciations, interactive 3D models, and real images — no competitor offers this
keyBenefits.left3Description: Get instant help with diagrams, resource links, and contextual explanations — without leaving your study session
keyBenefits.right1Description: Launch Kahoot-style group quizzes or share sessions with classmates — a feature unique to MyATPS in the ATPL space
keyBenefits.right2Description: E-books, PDFs, aviation annexes, and procedures — all accessible directly alongside your quizzes, no switching between apps
keyBenefits.right3Description: Color-coded tags, detailed statistics, and weak-area detection so you know exactly where to focus before exam day

productOverview.heading: Explore the Power of MyATPS
productOverview.description: While other platforms offer just a question bank, MyATPS integrates quizzes, dictionary, library, collaboration, and AI assistance into one seamless workflow.
productOverview.card1Description: Three quiz modes — STUDY for learning, TEST for self-assessment, and EXAM to simulate real conditions — each with research-based explanations that go beyond simple memorization.
productOverview.card2Description: The only ATPL dictionary with audio pronunciations, interactive 3D models, and real images — paired with a full resource library of e-books, PDFs, annexes, and aviation procedures.
productOverview.card3Description: The only ATPL platform where you can launch live group quizzes, share study sessions with classmates, and track your performance across all 14 EASA subjects.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.metaDescription: How MyATPS collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
privacyPage.s1Body: MyATPS ("we", "our", "us") operates the myatps.com website and the MyATPS platform. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our services.
privacyPage.s2Intro: We may collect the following types of information:
privacyPage.s2Item1Text: name, email address, and password when you create an account.
privacyPage.s2Item2Text: quiz results, study progress, bookmarks, and interaction data to provide and improve our services.
privacyPage.s2Item3Text: billing details processed securely through our third-party payment provider. We do not store your full card details.
privacyPage.s2Item4Text: IP address, browser type, device information, and cookies for analytics and service optimization.
privacyPage.s3Item1: Provide, maintain, and improve our platform and services.
privacyPage.s3Item2: Track your study progress and personalize your learning experience.
privacyPage.s3Item3: Process payments and manage your subscription.
privacyPage.s3Item4: Send you important updates about your account and our services.
privacyPage.s3Item5: Analyze usage patterns to improve features and content quality.
privacyPage.s3Item6: Ensure the security and integrity of our platform.
privacyPage.s4Body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our platform (hosting, payment processing, analytics), subject to strict confidentiality obligations. We may also disclose data if required by law.
privacyPage.s5Body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacyPage.s6Intro: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
privacyPage.s6Item1: Access the personal data we hold about you.
privacyPage.s6Item4: Object to or restrict the processing of your data.
privacyPage.s6Contact: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at
privacyPage.s7Body: We use essential cookies to operate our platform and optional analytics cookies to understand how our services are used. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacyPage.s8Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
privacyPage.s9Body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at

enterprise.metaTitle: Enterprise — The Complete Aviation Training LMS for Schools & Organizations
enterprise.metaDescription: A full-featured LMS for flight schools and aviation academies: student management, scheduling, financial management, proctored exams with Procteo, SSO, compliance tracking, and more — EASA, Transport Canada, and Loi 25 compliant.
enterprise.heroTitle: One platform to run your entire flight school
enterprise.heroDescription: MyATPS Enterprise replaces scattered tools with a single, integrated LMS — student management, scheduling, financial operations, proctored exams, compliance tracking, and a complete resource library. Built for EASA ATOs, Transport Canada flight units, and academies worldwide.
enterprise.modulesTitle: Everything your school needs — in one place
enterprise.modulesDescription: Other platforms force you to juggle scheduling tools, spreadsheets, and separate billing apps. MyATPS brings every module under one roof with shared data, role-based access, and real-time sync.
enterprise.module1Description: Enroll students, manage cohorts, assign instructors, track enrollment status, and maintain complete student profiles — documents, certificates, medical expirations, and contact details all in one place.
enterprise.module2Description: 20,000+ ATPL questions across all 14 EASA subjects with three quiz modes (STUDY, TEST, EXAM), research-based explanations, and the ability to create custom exam templates per cohort.
enterprise.module3Description: Ensure exam integrity with facial recognition, behavioral analysis, gaze tracking, and multi-layer fraud detection. Three configurable levels: Light, Moderate, and Strict — with full post-exam offline analysis.
enterprise.module4Description: Manage tuition billing, payment plans, invoice generation, and revenue tracking. Supports prepaid account balances, automatic billing cycles, and full financial reporting — no separate accounting software needed.
enterprise.module5Description: Schedule flights, manage aircraft availability, assign instructors, and track Hobbs-based flight hours. Students can self-book through the platform and view upcoming sessions from their dashboard.
enterprise.module6Description: Unified calendar for exams, ground school sessions, flights, and deadlines. Multi-view (day, week, month), drag-and-drop rescheduling, automatic conflict detection, and email/push notifications.
enterprise.module7Description: Distribute e-books, PDFs, aviation annexes, course materials, and video content — organized by subject and access level. Students access everything from their study environment without switching apps.
enterprise.module8Description: Enterprise-grade Single Sign-On with Keycloak (OIDC/SAML). Integrate with your organization's identity provider — Google Workspace, Microsoft Entra ID, Okta, or any SAML 2.0/OIDC provider.
enterprise.module9Description: Track student progress across all 14 subjects with color-coded analytics, weak-area detection, cohort comparisons, and exportable reports — everything instructors and administrators need for data-driven decisions.
enterprise.module10Description: Launch Kahoot-style live sessions for classroom engagement. Real-time leaderboards, participation tracking, and instant results — no separate accounts needed for participants.
enterprise.module11Description: A dedicated control center for instructors: create custom quizzes, assign homework, grade assessments, monitor student activity, manage their cohort, and view their flight schedule.
enterprise.module12Description: A built-in discussion forum where students can ask questions, share resources, and collaborate — moderated by instructors with role-based access controls.
enterprise.procteoSectionDescription: Ensure exam integrity with our advanced proctoring system. Procteo uses facial recognition, behavioral analysis, and multi-layer detection to monitor candidates in real time — with full offline analysis for post-exam review.
enterprise.procteoFeature1Description: Continuous identity verification throughout the exam session using advanced facial recognition.
enterprise.procteoFeature2Description: AI detects suspicious behaviors — gaze tracking, tab switching, unauthorized devices, and more.
enterprise.procteoFeature3Description: Full recording with post-exam deep analysis for comprehensive fraud detection and review.
enterprise.procteoFeature4Description: Instant notifications for instructors when suspicious activity is detected during an exam.
enterprise.procteoCtaDescription: See how Procteo monitors exam integrity — test it yourself with our interactive demo.
enterprise.complianceDescription: Aviation training demands strict regulatory adherence. MyATPS Enterprise is designed from the ground up to meet international data protection laws and aviation authority standards.
enterprise.compliance1Description: Fully aligned with European Aviation Safety Agency training organization requirements. Curriculum tracking, student records, and exam processes meet Part-FCL standards for approved training organizations.
enterprise.compliance2Description: Supports Transport Canada Civil Aviation flight training unit requirements — including record retention, student progress documentation, and ground school curriculum management.
enterprise.compliance3Description: Full EU General Data Protection Regulation compliance — data minimization, purpose limitation, right to erasure (balanced with EASA Part-147 record retention obligations), and Data Protection Impact Assessments.
enterprise.compliance4Description: Fully compliant with Quebec's privacy law (Law 25): designated privacy officer, privacy impact assessments, breach notification procedures, data portability, and consent management — meeting the highest Canadian privacy standard.
enterprise.compliance5Description: Choose where your data lives. European deployments on EU-based infrastructure, Canadian deployments on Canadian servers — no cross-border data transfers without explicit consent.
enterprise.compliance6Description: Complete audit trails for every student interaction, exam session, and administrative action. Generate compliance reports on demand for regulatory inspections and quality audits.
enterprise.plansDescription: Flexible pricing based on your school size, number of students, and feature requirements. All plans include the full LMS — no hidden module fees.
enterprise.planSchoolDescription: For individual flight schools and training organizations
enterprise.planAcademyDescription: For large academies and multi-site organizations
enterprise.testimonial1Text: "MyATPS Enterprise transformed how we run our school. We replaced three separate tools with one platform — exams, student management, and billing are all in one place now."
enterprise.testimonial1Role: Head of Training — ENAC Flight Academy
enterprise.testimonial2Text: "The multi-tenant setup is exactly what we needed. Each instructor manages their own cohort, the financial module saves us hours every month, and Procteo gives us real exam integrity."
enterprise.ctaTitle: Ready to run your flight school on one platform?
enterprise.ctaDescription: Join flight schools and aviation academies already using MyATPS Enterprise to manage students, exams, finances, and compliance — all from one place.

enterpriseProcteo.metaTitle: Procteo — AI-Powered Exam Proctoring for Aviation Training
enterpriseProcteo.metaDescription: Procteo ensures exam integrity with facial recognition, behavioral analysis, and multi-layer fraud detection. Built for flight schools and aviation academies.
enterpriseProcteo.heroTitle: AI-powered exam integrity, built for aviation
enterpriseProcteo.heroDescription: Procteo combines continuous facial recognition, behavioral analysis, and multi-layer fraud detection to ensure fair and secure examinations — from initial identity verification through live session monitoring to post-exam forensic review. Built for flight schools and aviation academies that can't afford integrity failures.
enterpriseProcteo.howItWorksDescription: Procteo operates on three levels simultaneously for comprehensive exam security.
enterpriseProcteo.layer1Description: Webcam, screen, and audio are captured throughout the exam session, creating a complete timeline for review.
enterpriseProcteo.layer2Description: Real-time analysis detects suspicious behavior as it happens — face changes, gaze shifts, unauthorized objects, tab switches.
enterpriseProcteo.layer3Description: After the exam, AI performs a thorough review of the full recording, correlating events and flagging patterns that real-time analysis might miss.
enterpriseProcteo.featuresDescription: Every signal works together to give proctors a complete picture of exam integrity — from initial identity checks to post-session forensic review.
enterpriseProcteo.feature1Description: Continuous face matching ensures the registered candidate is the one taking the exam.
enterpriseProcteo.feature2Description: Detects when candidates look away from the screen for extended periods.
enterpriseProcteo.feature3Description: Identifies unauthorized devices — phones, tablets, earbuds, or secondary screens.
enterpriseProcteo.feature4Description: Logs browser tab switches and application changes during the exam.
enterpriseProcteo.feature5Description: Detects conversations, whispers, or other suspicious audio patterns.
enterpriseProcteo.feature6Description: AI identifies unusual timing patterns, copy-paste attempts, and other anomalies.
enterpriseProcteo.configDescription: Three proctoring levels to match your exam requirements.
enterpriseProcteo.configLightDescription: Basic webcam monitoring with periodic snapshots. Suitable for low-stakes assessments and homework.
enterpriseProcteo.configModerateDescription: Continuous recording with real-time alerts. Ideal for practice exams and regular assessments.
enterpriseProcteo.configStrictDescription: Full multi-layer monitoring with offline deep analysis. Required for official ATPL mock exams and certifications.
enterpriseProcteo.ctaDescription: Try our interactive demo to experience how Procteo monitors exam integrity.

enterpriseDemo.metaTitle: Procteo Demo — Try AI Exam Proctoring
enterpriseDemo.metaDescription: Experience Procteo's AI-powered exam proctoring firsthand. Test facial recognition, behavioral analysis, and real-time monitoring in our interactive demo.
enterpriseDemo.title: Experience Procteo in action
enterpriseDemo.description: This demo simulates a real proctoring session. Allow camera access to see how Procteo monitors exam integrity in real time.
enterpriseDemo.permissionDescription: Procteo needs access to your webcam to demonstrate facial recognition and monitoring capabilities.
enterpriseDemo.activeDescription: Procteo is now monitoring. Try looking away, switching tabs, or covering the camera to see how the system reacts.
enterpriseDemo.resultsDescription: Here's a summary of what Procteo detected during your demo session.
enterpriseDemo.noEvents: No suspicious events detected — great behavior!
enterpriseDemo.contactDescription: Contact our sales team to discuss how Procteo can be integrated into your training program.

enterpriseDemo.permScreenWarn: Please select "Entire Screen" for proper monitoring.
enterpriseDemo.identityDrop: Click to upload a photo or ID document
enterpriseDemo.liteNotice: This is a lite demo version. The full Procteo platform includes AI-powered face recognition, deep behavioral analysis, and comprehensive offline review.
enterpriseDemo.emailNotice: Your email will be used to send you the detailed offline analysis report after the demo.
enterpriseDemo.offlineNotice: A detailed AI analysis of your session is being processed. Results will be sent to your email within 30 minutes.
enterpriseDemo.offlineDesc: Our AI is performing a deep analysis of your recorded session — face tracking, object detection, behavioral patterns. This takes longer but produces a more accurate report.
enterpriseDemo.sysCheckDesc: Checking your device is ready for the proctored exam.
enterpriseDemo.consentDataTitle: What we collect during this demo
enterpriseDemo.consentDataVideo: Video — your face and upper body

enterpriseDemo.consentRule5: Stay visible in the camera at all times

common.author: Author

q1.question: What is the minimum safe altitude over a congested area?
q1.b: 1,000 feet above the highest obstacle within 600m

q2.question: Which instrument indicates the aircraft's heading?

q3.question: What does a steady red light from the control tower mean to an aircraft on the ground?

q4.question: In the ICAO phonetic alphabet, what is the word for the letter 'G'?

q5.question: What is the primary purpose of wing flaps?
q5.b: To increase lift at lower speeds

q7.question: In a standard holding pattern, which direction are the turns?

q8.question: What is the effect of an aft center of gravity on aircraft performance?

q9.question: What does a VOR navigation instrument display?
q9.d: Radial position relative to the station

q10.question: What is the standard pressure setting for the transition altitude?

pricingPage.metaTitle: MyATPS Pricing — Free plan and Premium at €10/month with no commitment
pricingPage.metaDescription: Among the lowest prices in the ATPL market. Free plan with no credit card, Premium at €10/month with no commitment — one-click cancellation. Every tool you need to pass your 14 ATPL exams.
pricingPage.heroTitle: ATPL preparation accessible to every student pilot
pricingPage.heroSubtitle: A Free plan with no credit card. A Premium plan at €10/month with no commitment. One-click cancellation, no surprises.
pricingPage.whyBody1: A low, no-commitment monthly subscription is the only model that fits the rhythm of a student pilot. ATPL preparation usually lasts 6 to 12 months; you pay for what you use, nothing more, and you stop the month you sit your last exam.
pricingPage.whyBody2: No hidden fees, no cancellation fees, no upsell tiers. One paid plan, one price, €10/month, for the full platform.
pricingPage.whyBody3: The Free plan exists to remove the barrier to entry: a student going through selection or a school evaluating the product should be able to try it without a credit card and without a time limit.
pricingPage.compareTitle: How we compare on the market
pricingPage.compareIntro: Most EASA ATPL preparation platforms sit in the following ranges:
pricingPage.compareRow3Label: Free plan without a credit card
pricingPage.compareRow3Value: Rare — usually a limited 3–7 day trial
pricingPage.compareRow4Value: €10/month, no commitment, + permanent Free plan with no credit card
pricingPage.compareNote: Competitor pricing reflects the figures publicly listed on their sites at the time of writing. We refresh this page regularly.
pricingPage.finalCtaSubtitle: Create your free account in under a minute. No credit card, no surprises.
